field_changes.previous: Two independent research passes over the same aggregator mirror returned inconsistent role/date/stake attributions across the three named co-owners of one label s.r.o. Neither pass reached a raw or.justice.cz page directly — its search UI is JS-rendered and blocked automated fetch both times — so this cannot yet be resolved to VERIFIED_PRIMARY. All three names (Juhaňák, Jakub Kaman, Ondřej Kaman) are confirmed to hold SOME stake/role in the company; only the precise split and dates are in dispute. Recorded as a live contradiction rather than silently picking one version. A manual or.justice.cz lookup for IČO 02474727 would resolve this.
field_changes.current: RESOLVED 2026-07-18 from the primary register (ARES VR record for IČO 02474727, preserved and hashed): Jakub Kaman — 36 % and jednatel since 2 Jan 2014 (sole founder, 100 % until 2017); Ondřej Kaman — 34 % (49 % during 2017–2022) and jednatel since 23 Feb 2022; Radek Juhaňák — 30 % and jednatel since 23 Feb 2022, both continuously registered (the 2024-09-04 rows are re-registrations, not exits). The two mirror passes were each PARTIALLY right — their fragments were complementary, not conflicting; neither captured the whole record. See CLM-19.

observed_at_basis: nederivovatelné z kanonických dat — poctivé null
